title: CiteCoverageReport type extension + i18n locales for contract metrics
description: Finalize CiteCoverageReport TypeScript type with new contract fields (contract_marker_ts, contract_metrics_status, contract_metrics object with all sub-fields, per_layer_type cross-tab, cite_id_unresolved). Add zh-CN + en i18n strings for new report sections (contract check header, skip reason labels, layer breakdown, drift skip message).

files.target: CiteCoverageReport zod schema + TypeScript type (locate via grep CiteCoverageReport)
files.change: Extend Zod schema with: contract_marker_ts: z.number(), contract_marker_emitted_now: z.boolean(), contract_metrics_status: z.enum(['ok','skipped:bootstrap_drift','awaiting_marker']), contract_metrics: z.object({ decisions_cited: z.number(), pitfalls_cited: z.number(), contract_with: z.number(), contract_missing: z.number(), hard_violated: z.number(), cite_id_unresolved: z.number(), skip_count: z.record(z.string(), z.number()) }).optional(), per_layer_type: z.record(z.string(), z.record(z.string(), z.number())).optional(). Preserve all existing fields exactly.

Add keys: 'cite-coverage.contract.header': '应用契约校验', 'cite-coverage.contract.decisions_cited': 'decisions 引用', 'cite-coverage.contract.pitfalls_cited': 'pitfalls 引用', 'cite-coverage.contract.with': '已附契约', 'cite-coverage.contract.missing': '缺契约', 'cite-coverage.contract.hard_violated': '硬性违规', 'cite-coverage.contract.cite_id_unresolved': '引用 ID 不存在', 'cite-coverage.contract.skip_count': 'skip 桶', 'cite-coverage.contract.skipped_bootstrap_drift': '已跳过(bootstrap drift — 请运行 fab install)', 'cite-coverage.contract.awaiting_marker': '等待首次 marker emit', 'cite-coverage.layer.team': 'team', 'cite-coverage.layer.personal': 'personal', 'cite-coverage.layer.team_review': '[team — 需复核]', 'cite-coverage.layer.personal_fyi': '[personal — fyi]', 'cite-coverage.skip.sequencing': '顺序约束', 'cite-coverage.skip.conditional': '条件分支', 'cite-coverage.skip.semantic': '语义约束', 'cite-coverage.skip.aesthetic': '美学/风格', 'cite-coverage.skip.architectural': '架构层', 'cite-coverage.skip.other': '其他'.

Mirror zh-CN keys with English text: 'cite-coverage.contract.header': 'Contract check', 'decisions_cited': 'Decisions cited', 'pitfalls_cited': 'Pitfalls cited', 'with': 'With contract', 'missing': 'Missing contract', 'hard_violated': 'Hard violations', 'cite_id_unresolved': 'Unresolved cite IDs', 'skip_count': 'Skip bucket', 'skipped_bootstrap_drift': 'skipped (bootstrap drift — run `fab install`)', 'awaiting_marker': 'awaiting first marker emit', 'layer.team_review': '[team — review]', 'layer.personal_fyi': '[personal — fyi]', skip labels: 'sequencing constraint', 'conditional branch', 'semantic rule', 'style/aesthetic', 'architectural layer', 'other'.

Add cases: (1) report with full contract_metrics roundtrips; (2) report without contract_metrics (optional) still valid; (3) per_layer_type cross-tab roundtrip; (4) reject invalid contract_metrics_status enum value. ≥4 cases.

implementation: Read packages/shared/src/schemas/api-contracts.ts to locate current CiteCoverageReport schema.
Extend Zod schema with new fields (preserving optional/required semantics).
Update both i18n locales with parallel key sets (verify keys exactly match between zh-CN and en files).
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared test api-contracts` to confirm green.

reference.examples: rc.20 CiteCoverageReport initial definition + i18n; rc.23 cite-none-sentinel extension.

rationale.chosen_approach: Extend existing CiteCoverageReport; do not split into separate ContractMetricsReport. Single payload simplifies CLI consumption.
alternatives_considered: Separate ContractReport type (rejected: forces caller to do two queries)
decision_factors: i18n parity easier with one block
rationale.tradeoffs: CiteCoverageReport type grows; mitigated by optional fields for backward-compat.

manual_checks: Verify zh-CN and en have identical key sets (no missing translations)
integration: i18n key parity check (custom test: assert Object.keys(zhCN) === Object.keys(en) for cite-coverage block)

criteria: contract_metrics shape contains all 7 sub-fields per spec
zh-CN.ts contains ≥18 new cite-coverage.contract.* and cite-coverage.skip.* keys
en.ts contains identical key set to zh-CN
Commit msg: 'feat(rc24): CiteCoverageReport contract fields + bilingual i18n (TASK-09)'
